  1. Home
  2. rule
  3. Oceania
  4. Christmas Island

Christmas Island 🦀

How to Distinguish

  • The domain is .cx
  • Yellow license plates are common.
  • There are tens of millions of Christmas Island red crabs, and warnings about crabs can be seen by the roadside (References Christmas Island red crabs).
  • The Google Car is distinctive.

    There are warnings about Christmas Island red crabs. Bridges are built over roads to help crabs cross safely. Crabs also feed on fallen leaves. If you sense crabs, it’s likely this island.

    The Google Car is distinctive, with what looks like a truck bed visible.

    Related Pages

    • Christmas Island (wikipedia)
